title: AN ACT TO AUTHORIZE THE EXPENDITURE OF THE PROCEEDS OF A LOAN NOW BEING APPLIED FOR BY THE GOVERNMENT FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF CERTAIN HYDRO-ELECTRIC POWER PROJECTS AND THE ERECTION OF A FERTILIZER PLANT.

chunks.text: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. That the proceeds of the loan of one hundred seventy-six million pesos being applied for from the credit institutions herein-above named is hereby appropriated, if and when the same shall have been granted, for the following projects:

1.

The construction of complete hydro-electric power plants, including preliminary investigations, preparation of technical plans and specifications, acquisition of equipment, materials, supplies and services necessary therefor, building of dams, reservoir, transmission system and other accessory installations at-

(a)

Ambuklao

P48,000,000.00

(b)

Itogon

70,000,000.00

(c)

Maria Cristina

23,400,000.00

2.

The diversion of the Lumot River and increasing the height of the dam of the Caliraya reservoir

6,000,000.00

3.

The erection and construction of a fertilizer plant

28,600,000.00

Total

P176,000,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 1, 1948.
